'''Dragon-bird robot drones''' were flying [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that were fashioned after the [[dragon-bird]]s that were native to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]. They were used for target practice by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]]
